en: I am buying a radio for my sister.

en: In that shop there are very good models.
_te_TG: ఆ కొట్లో మంచి మంచి మోడల్సు ఉన్నాయి.

en: Today, big bazaar shops have holiday (observe holiday).

en: Please tune this radio (turn on this radio).
"Aakashavaani, now you are listening to movie songs".

en: Give me also one of the same model.

en: It's okay, I am sitting in this chair.
